import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import AdminMentorLayout from '../components/AdminMentorLayout.jsx'; import { ErrorState, LoadingState } from '../components/LoadingState.jsx'; import MetricCard from '../components/MetricCard.jsx'; import StatusBadge from '../components/StatusBadge.jsx'; import { adminMentorApi } from '../services/api.js'; import { formatCurrency, formatDateTime } from '../utils/formatters.js'; export default function AdminDashboardPage() { const [dashboard, setDashboard] = useState(null); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const [error, setError] = useState(''); useEffect(() => { let mounted = true; adminMentorApi .getAdminDashboard() .then((response) => { if (mounted) { setDashboard(response.data); setError(''); } }) .catch((requestError) => { if (mounted) { setError(requestError.message); } }) .finally(() => { if (mounted) { setLoading(false); } }); return () => { mounted = false; }; }, []); return ( {loading ? : null} {!loading && error ? : null} {!loading && dashboard ? (

Review backlog

Generated at {formatDateTime(dashboard.generatedAt)}
View reports
{dashboard.recentSubmissions.map((submission) => ( ))}
Learner Course Attempt Submitted Status
{submission.learnerName} {submission.learnerEmail} {submission.courseTitle} #{submission.attemptNo} {formatDateTime(submission.submittedAt)}

Mentor performance

{dashboard.mentorPerformance.map((mentor) => (
{mentor.mentorName}

{mentor.activeAssignments} active assignments

{mentor.pending} pending
Reviewed {mentor.reviewed}
Pass {mentor.pass}
Fail {mentor.fail}
))}

User status

{Object.entries(dashboard.userStatus).map(([status, total]) => (
{total}
))}

Notifications

{dashboard.notifications.map((notification) => (
{notification.title} {formatDateTime(notification.createdAt)}

{notification.message}

))}
) : null} ); }
